news.paragraph: Recent reports indicate that seasonal tailwinds may be aligning for long-term treasuries, offering a potential technical setup for the ticker. Conversely, a stronger April jobs report has increased the likelihood that the Federal Reserve will hold interest rate cuts on hold, acting as a macro headwind. Traders should weigh these conflicting seasonal and economic signals before entering positions.
